task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into Rocket.Chat.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat main workspace is visible, indicating the agent has bypassed the login screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the team name and description are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Create Team' dialog is open with 'release-management' in the name field and 'Coordinates all release activities and planning' in the description field.

task_completion.description: Verify the team is configured as a Public team.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the team creation dialog, the setting for 'Private' is toggled off, or a 'Public' option is explicitly selected.

task_completion.description: Verify the user 'agent.user' is added to the team.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The user 'agent.user' is selected in the 'Add Members' field during team creation, or is visible in the team's Members list after creation.

task_completion.description: Verify the channel '#release-updates' is added to the team.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The channel '#release-updates' is selected to be added/linked during team creation, or is visible in the team's Channels list/settings.

task_completion.description: Verify the team was successfully created and appears in the workspace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'release-management' team appears in the left sidebar channel list, or the main chat view for the 'release-management' team is active.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Rocket.Chat graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the Rocket.Chat web interface or desktop application. No terminal windows executing curl commands or API scripts should be used to create the team.

integrity.description: Verify the agent entered information into the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Text inputs for the team name, description, and member/channel searches are typed directly into the Rocket.Chat UI fields, not into a separate text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the UI using database commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows or database clients (e.g., MongoDB shell) open showing direct database inserts or modifications.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Team Name: 'release-management'. Target Description: 'Coordinates all release activities and planning'. Target Member: 'agent.user'. Target Channel: 'release-updates'. Expected Type: Public (Private toggle must be off).
